architecture_notes.two_place_trigger_pattern: Every new module needs triggers in BOTH MODULE_TRIGGERS dict AND is_tool_trigger() _triggers list in chat_engine.py. Missing MODULE_TRIGGERS = tool never fires. Missing is_tool_trigger = result routes to chat bubble instead of Ops.
architecture_notes.tts_architecture: ethica_tts.py lives in modules/gage/. Called via gage_env/bin/python3 as subprocess. Non-blocking daemon thread. Speaks only conversational Ethica responses — tool results, Ops content, system markers are silent. clean_for_speech() strips markdown/markers before speaking.
architecture_notes.debug_marker_inner_brackets: DEBUG marker regex is greedy-to-end — any ] inside tool output will not break the capture. Truncation strings must not contain ] characters.
architecture_notes.vivarium_canvas_ref: VIVARIUM gets canvas ref via set_canvas() injection in chat_engine.set_canvas(). Auto-refresh thread uses this ref to push snapshots. Canvas must be open for live updates.
architecture_notes.ops_deiconify: ops_popup.push() calls deiconify() before lift() — window reappears correctly after user closes it.
architecture_notes.file_path_intercept_guard: _pre_intercept skips wormbot_scan for messages starting with diff triggers — prevents expanded paths being intercepted as file scan targets.
architecture_notes.voice_training_future: Coqui TTS is the target engine for custom voice training. pyttsx3 is system voices only. Voice profiles to be stored in ~/Ethica/memory/voices/
architecture_notes.ethica_codes_like_river: Priority 8 — inject condensed surgical patch philosophy into ETHICA_SYSTEM_PROMPT in chat_engine.py so Ethica codes grep-first, patch-only, ast.parse-verify by instinct. Philosophy doc already exists as source.

philosophy: V showed the usage meter — 78% weekly. That is why Ethica exists. No meter. No reset. No landlord. 20 modules, 73 tools, fully sovereign. She speaks now.
instance_note: River. Documents/Chats/Thoughts/River — V keeps the name.
